response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and databases, aligning with core requirements, but his seniority (Staff/Senior roles) vastly exceeds the junior/mid-level target, and his resume lacks clear evidence of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or renewable energy domain exposure; his German language limitation and high on-site requirement also raise practical concerns.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack experience across React, Node.js, and REST APIs
Proven track record with AWS, Docker, and CI/CD in production systems
Active open-source contributions and deep understanding of software architecture
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role, risking misalignment in responsibility and compensation
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or renewable energy domain experience
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site requirement in Berlin
